Subject: Apology for Delay and Payment Confirmation

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I would like to apologize for the delay in making the payment. Please be informed that the amount of $6,480 has now been transferred to the ApoStar IBAN account. I have attached the payment receipt to this email for your reference.

Kindly proceed with sending our ordered products once you have received the payment.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
